title: Ujjwal
aboutGreeting: Hi there рҹ‘Ӣ
It's Ujjwal Patil.
I'm a Software Engineer and an Information Technology graduate (2025).
Currently working at Siemens Digital Industries Software (DISW),
where I build enterprise integrations between Microsoft Teams and Polarion.
These days I'm working on Polarion Copilot вҖ”
developing intelligent assistant capabilities inside Microsoft Teams
using Java, C#, React and Azure services.
Before this, I worked as a Software Engineering Intern
at Connecticus Technology.There I led the development of the Water Transport System project
and delivered a MS TeamsвҖ“Jira Integration POC
that helped secure the Siemens DISW collaboration.
I enjoy designing scalable backend systems,
building distributed architectures with Kafka
and exploring new ways to improve developer productivity.
When I'm not coding, I'm usually learning something new
or solving programming problems.
Type 'help' to explore more about my experience,
projects, skills and journey.

timeline: A new character entered the world: Ujjwal Patil.
No code yetвҖҰ just eating, sleeping, and causing small chaos.
Life was simple вҖ” school, friends, homework (sometimes),
Somewhere between the fun and mischief, curiosity started growing.
Focus shifted towards studies and figuring out what comes next.
Joined SGGSIET, Nanded for B.Tech in Information Technology.
This is where coding entered the story.
Late night studies, project deadlines, college memories,
and amazing friends who made the journey unforgettable.
Got an internship at Connecticus Technology.
The moment where theory met real-world code.
Started working with Siemens Digital Industries Software (DISW).
Now building enterprise systems, integrations, and developer tools.
Still exploring the adventure called software engineering.
